title: GitStatusReply
description:
Return type for `com.nexus.git::status` (handler id `1`). Mirrors
[`crate::types::GitState`] for the wire (the engine emits
`repo_state` as a stringified Debug of [`crate::types::RepoState`]).

branch.description: Current branch name, or `null` if HEAD is detached.

head.description: Short hex of HEAD commit (or `"(none)"` for empty repos).

is_dirty.description: Whether the working tree has uncommitted changes.
